en: Afternoon, ma'am. When do you put that magnificent display of prizes on show?
ko: 안녕하세요, 마님.

en: And who won it? I did. I did. Well done.
ko: 누가 이겼어? 나야, 나! 잘했어.

en: And the year before? Her Ladyship won that one, too. Heavens.
ko: 그리고 그 전 해에는? 그녀의 귀족이 그것도 이겼어. 세상에.

en: How thrilling. And before that? You've met my father.
ko: 세상에, 정말 흥미롭네. 그 이전에는?

en: Good afternoon, Mr. Molesley. What are you showing this year? Oh, this and that.
ko: 안녕하세요, 몰슬리 씨. 올해는 뭐 보여줄 거야? 아, 이것저것. 마을에서 가장 좋은 장미들만.

en: We're very lucky. We'll see some beautiful examples right across the show, won't we, Mr. Molesley?
ko: 전시회에서 아름다운 예시들을 많이 볼 수 있겠지, 몰슬리 씨? 그렇게 말씀하신다면, 마님.

en: If you say so, Your Ladyship. The Flower Show?
ko: 전시회에서 아름다운 예시들을 많이 볼 수 있겠지, 몰슬리 씨? 그렇게 말씀하신다면, 마님.

en: Oh, I thought I was in for another telling off about the hospital. No, this time it's the Flower Show.
ko: 꽃 전시회. 꽃 전시회.

en: I've been to see old Mr. Molesley's garden, and his roses are the most beautiful I've ever laid eyes on.

en: Did that missing box of yours ever turn up? It was a fuss about nothing. They must have put it back on the wrong shelf when they were dusting.

en: Bates found it this morning. Next time, have a proper look before you start complaining. I'm sure the servants were frightened half to death.
